message:
refactor(db): use byte-level ASCII lowercasing for case-insensitive sort and fix s3fifo test types

queries.rs: Replace `to_ascii_lowercase()` string allocation with
byte-iterator `eq_ignore_ascii_case` / `to_ascii_lowercase()` for
recipient kind ranking and name sorting — avoids temporary String
allocation on every comparison.

s3fifo.rs: Fix `test_ghost_eviction_duplicate_seq_bug` to use owned
Strings (`"a".to_string()`) instead of `&str` literals, matching the
cache's expected key type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
